mapper.select: SELECT co.order_id AS orderId, co.fulfillment_order_id AS fulfillmentOrderId, co.invoice_no AS invoiceNo, esi.carrier_type AS carrierType FROM channel_order co JOIN easypost_shipment_invoice esi ON esi.invoice_no = co.invoice_no WHERE co.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND co.order_channel = #{orderChannel} AND co.channel_sync_yn = false AND co.invoice_no IS NOT NULL
